usage: writeFPlanScript [-help] [-appendToFile] [-compactRow] -fileName <string> [-no_snap_to_grid] [-selected  | -sections {boundary row placeBlockages routeBlockages pinBlockages groups constraints pins ioPad areaIO bump partitions blocks globalNetConnect busSinkGroups blackboxes netGroupAndBusGuide relativefplan pinGroups pinGuides customShape coverCell pg_pins}]

options.name: -appendToFile
options.description: by default, we will create a new output file(overwrite it if the file already existed), this option will let new data append to the file already existed.

options.name: -compactRow
options.description: Enable this command to write out the row-creation commands in a simple and compact way

options.name: -fileName
options.description: file name of dumped tcl command

options.name: -no_snap_to_grid
options.description: Specify object not snap to specified grid.

options.name: -sections
options.description: {boundary row placeBlockages routeBlockages pinBlockages groups constraints pins ioPad areaIO bump partitions blocks globalNetConnect busSinkGroups blackboxes netGroupAndBusGuide relativefplan pinGroups pinGuides customShape coverCell pg_pins} specify which kind of floorplan objects need to be dumped out.
